biological_replicate: we purchased Syrian golden hamsters (Mesocricetus auratus) of the HsdHan:AURA strain at 3–4 weeks of age.
technical_replicate: from each triplicate set of 19-day post-infection hookworms isolated from hamsters.
experimental_design: with hamster hosts that either had normal immune systems or were immunosuppressed by dexamethasone.
factor_value: normal immune systems or were immunosuppressed by dexamethasone
number_of_fractions: we identified 565 genes encoding ES proteins observed in at least one ES collection (1.7% of all genes).
number_of_technical_replicates: from each triplicate set of 19-day post-infection hookworms.
number_of_biological_replicates: we immunosuppressed half of each set of hamsters.
number_of_samples: we immunosuppressed half of each set of hamsters.
